interpretation_limits.cumulative_soil_energy: only mixed-domain full-history initial/final and closure are reported; domain contributions are assigned from interval increments, never by filtering cumulative state values
interpretation_limits.pattern_review: Every pattern comparison must name mixed_domain, source_only, or proxy_only; proxy_only is continuation behavior, not source-paper, impact, or safety evidence.
interpretation_limits.support_total_physical_dynamic_balance: includes physical-reference preload; runtime_delta metrics are read directly from the explicit nested runtime_delta result fields
